Child’s Play (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $29,208,403Details
International Box Office $14,291,177
Worldwide Box Office $43,499,580
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,561,315
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,691,609
Total $3,252,924
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The story follows a mother named Karen, who gives her son Andy a toy doll for his birthday, unaware of its sinister nature.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$14,094,594 (48.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.07 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:67.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:3,007 opening theaters/3,007 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $38,136,732

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 21st, 2019 (Wide) by United Artists
International Releases: June 19th, 2019 (Wide), released as La bambola assassina (Italy)
June 20th, 2019 (Wide) (South Korea)
June 20th, 2019 (Wide), released as ДЕТСКИЕ ИГРЫ (Russia (CIS))
June 21st, 2019 (Wide) (Netherlands)
June 21st, 2019 (Wide), released as Child's Play (Australia)
Video Release: September 10th, 2019 by MGM Video
MPA Rating: R for bloody horror violence, and language throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2578 (Cert #52201), 5/15/2019)
Running Time: 120 minutes
Franchise: Child's Play
Cast, crew, or production detail: Reboot, Remake
Plot point: Artificial Intelligence, Killer Inanimate Objects, Living Toys
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: KatzSmith Productions, Orion Pictures, Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures, Bron Creative
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
